Home Duct Cleaning Services

Professional Duct Cleaning Services in San Diego

Improving your Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) starts with clean air ducts. At EZ Heat & Air, we provide comprehensive duct cleaning services in San Diego, removing dust, dirt, mold, and pollutants from your HVAC system.

Our NADCA-certified technicians use specialized equipment including high-powered vacuum systems and rotating brushes to ensure your home's air is clean and healthy. We offer transparent pricing and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

Don't breathe in contaminated air. Contact EZ Heat and Air today for a professional inspection and upfront estimate. We are your trusted partner for total indoor comfort.

San Diego Duct Cleaning Services by EZ Heat and Air

Residential Duct Cleaning

Comprehensive Inspection and Cleaning of Your Entire Home Air Duct and Vent System. We Remove Allergens and Improve Airflow.

Commercial Duct Cleaning

Expert Service for Offices, Schools, and Hospitals. We Handle Large-Scale Industrial Systems With Specialized Heavy-Duty Tools.

Disinfection Of Air Ducts

Using Safe, EPA-Approved Chemicals to Eliminate Bacteria and Contaminants, Ensuring Your Family Breathes Healthy Air.

San Diego Duct Cleaning Experts

Clean air ducts can significantly reduce the symptoms of allergies and asthma by removing dust and dander from your environment. At EZ Heat & Air, we utilize advanced video inspection tools to show you the results of our cleaning.

Our process involves high-powered vacuum systems and rotating brushes that reach deep into your ductwork. We prioritize cleanliness and ensure your home is left as tidy as we found it.

With upfront price estimates and NADCA-certified technicians, we are the leading provider of air duct maintenance in San Diego.

Why Choose EZ Heat and Air for Duct Cleaning?

With decades of experience in heating and cooling, EZ Heat and Air specializes in providing prompt and flawless duct cleaning services across San Diego. Our NATE-certified technicians are trained in the latest technologies to handle even the most complex challenges.

We prioritize indoor air quality and energy efficiency, helping you breathe easier while lowering your utility bills. With 24/7 availability and upfront pricing, we are your trusted partner for total indoor comfort in San Diego.

FAQs

It is generally recommended to have your residential ductwork professionally cleaned every 3 to 5 years, or more often if you have pets or smokers in the home.

Benefits include improved indoor air quality, reduced allergens like dust and mold, lower energy consumption, and an extended lifespan for your HVAC system.

Duct cleaning services in San Diego typically range from $300 to $700, depending on the size of the home and the complexity of the ductwork.

We utilize high-powered vacuum systems, rotating brushes, compressed air tools, and video inspections to ensure a thorough cleaning of your entire system.

Signs include persistent dust throughout the home, increased allergy symptoms, musty odors from vents, or visible mold growth inside the ducts.
